title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Cash & Carry - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Cash & Carry - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Metro Cash & Carry in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Metro Cash & Carry:
Metro Cash & Carry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
